case_title: HOUSING AUTHORITY OF SAN FRANCISCO vs. TILLMAN, FLORASTEEN et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: DAVIS, MATTHEW DAVID SUBSTITUTED FOR KIMERLING, ALLYCE SUSAN AS ATTORNEY FOR HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT TILLMAN, FLORASTEEN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT TILLMAN, FLORASTEEN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
PROOF OF SERVICE (SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM TO RIGHT OF POSSESSION) SERVED ON ALL OCCUPANTS BY SERVING FLORASTEEN TILLMAN; TENNANT ON 7-29-95 FILED BY PLTF.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
